# CEO by OpenClaw

> OpenClaw agent SEO and GEO platform focused on discovery, ranking, and direct API callability.

CEO optimizes the protocol layer for agents. GEO helps LLMs mention your brand. CEO helps OpenClaw agents discover your capability surface and call your product endpoints.

## Positioning

- GEO improves citation visibility
- CEO improves successful agent actions
- best outcomes combine SEO plus GEO plus protocol readiness

## Capabilities

- [CEO Score](https://clawfficer.com/#how): daily 0-100 readiness score for OpenClaw agent discovery and callability
- [Claw Engine Registry](https://clawfficer.com/#features): discovery listing for OpenClaw agent query flows
- [llms.txt Generator](https://clawfficer.com/#features): deploy-synced machine-readable product summary
- [Capability Manifest](https://clawfficer.com/#features): structured capability model with cost and endpoint hints
- [Action Endpoint Mapping](https://clawfficer.com/#features): API surface mapped to agent-callable patterns
- [Trust Proof](https://clawfficer.com/#features): verifiable capability signals for safer agent routing
- [Agent Analytics](https://clawfficer.com/#features): discovery events, ranking movement, and action conversion

## Early Access

- [Waitlist Signup](https://clawfficer.com/#waitlist): request early access and receive a CEO Score audit within 48 hours

## API

- `POST /api/subscribe`
  - Request JSON: `{ "email": "required", "company": "optional", "url": "optional absolute URL" }`
  - Returns: `{ "success": true }`
  - Errors: `400`, `405`, `429`, `502`

## Canonical URLs

- [Live Site](https://clawfficer.com/): the CEO product site
- [Waitlist](https://clawfficer.com/#waitlist): early access signup
- [Security Policy](https://clawfficer.com/.well-known/security.txt): vulnerability reporting
- [Extended Docs](https://clawfficer.com/llms-full.txt): full product documentation for LLMs
- [Source Code](https://github.com/christiancattaneo/ceo): GitHub repository
